requirement_topic.en: China GB/T Inverter Evidence Versus Tunisia Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 中国GB/T逆变器证据与突尼斯接受性
requirement_topic.zht: 中國GB/T逆變器證據與突尼西亞接受性

summary.en: Tunisia-facing evidence should be organized around the Tunisian project route, IEC / NT standards, STEG connection review, and ANME program requirements. China GB/T standards can be useful technical evidence, but they do not by themselves prove Tunisian conformity unless the reviewer accepts them or a clause-by-clause equivalence file is approved.
summary.zh: 面向突尼斯的证据应围绕突尼斯项目路径、IEC / NT标准、STEG并网审查和ANME项目要求组织。中国GB/T标准可作为有用技术证据，但除非审查方接受或批准逐条等效性文件，否则其本身不能证明符合突尼斯要求。
summary.zht: 面向突尼西亞的證據應圍繞突尼西亞項目路徑、IEC / NT標準、STEG併網審查和ANME項目要求組織。中國GB/T標準可作為有用技術證據，但除非審查方接受或批准逐條等效性文件，否則其本身不能證明符合突尼西亞要求。

summary.en: China evidence commonly includes GB/T 37408 for grid-connected photovoltaic inverters, GB/T 19964 for photovoltaic power-station grid connection, NB/T 32004-family technical specifications, EMC reports, and factory declarations. These documents should be treated as input evidence, not automatic Tunisia approvals.
summary.zh: 中国证据通常包括光伏并网逆变器GB/T 37408、光伏发电站接入电力系统GB/T 19964、NB/T 32004系列技术规范、电磁兼容报告和工厂声明。这些文件应视为输入证据，而非突尼斯自动批准。
summary.zht: 中國證據通常包括光伏併網逆變器GB/T 37408、光伏發電站接入電力系統GB/T 19964、NB/T 32004系列技術規範、電磁相容報告和工廠聲明。這些文件應視為輸入證據，而非突尼西亞自動批准。

gap.en: Create a matrix that maps each GB/T or NB/T test item to the requested IEC, NT, STEG, ANME, tender, or contract clause. Mark unsupported clauses clearly and close them with additional IEC reports, lab statements, firmware setting records, or project tests.
gap.zh: 应建立矩阵，将每一项GB/T或NB/T测试项目映射到被要求的IEC、NT、STEG、ANME、招标或合同条款。明确标注未覆盖条款，并通过额外IEC报告、实验室声明、固件定值记录或项目测试补齐。
gap.zht: 應建立矩陣，將每一項GB/T或NB/T測試項目映射到被要求的IEC、NT、STEG、ANME、招標或合同條款。明確標註未覆蓋條款，並通過額外IEC報告、實驗室聲明、韌體定值記錄或項目測試補齊。

mandatory_status.target: Tunisian acceptance is mandatory where required by the authority, utility, tender, buyer, financier, insurer, or project owner; China GB/T evidence is only supporting evidence unless expressly accepted
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T standards are common China technical references; their mandatory or voluntary status depends on the Chinese scheme, product, tender, and buyer requirement

source.publisher: National Public Service Platform for Standards Information (SAMR / SAC)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use China GB/T reports as mapped technical evidence, not as a substitute for Tunisia project approval, IEC / NT evidence, or STEG / ANME review.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将中国GB/T报告作为经过映射的技术证据使用，而不是替代突尼斯项目批准、IEC / NT证据或STEG / ANME审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將中國GB/T報告作為經過映射的技術證據使用，而不是替代突尼西亞項目批准、IEC / NT證據或STEG / ANME審查。
